title: Beef Chunkus
description: Adds the best food item to the game.
body:
### The Fabric version requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### The Spigot version requires the [Beef Chunkus Resourcepack](https://github.com/EssieFir/Beef-Chunkus/releases/tag/0.1.4)

# Beef Chunkus
Adds Beef Chunkus, a food item that fills up to 70 food points before being fully consumed. </br>
*Golden Chunkus coming soon...

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DvYm-6jBLCE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## The Spigot Plugin
The Spigot Plugin requires you to have a resourcepack installed, you can provide the resourcepack as a server resourcepack using the following link in your server.properties: </br>
`https://github.com/EssieFir/Beef-Chunkus/releases/download/0.1.4/beef_chunkus_resourcepack.zip` </br>
(Look for `resource-pack=`) </br>
And the SHA1: </br>
`bbe9c2adb712b219ce6a3a93d356ba4692f98c37` </br>
(Look for `resource-pack-sha1=`) </br>

If the custom model data in the resourcepack is conflicting with something else you have, make sure to change it in the plugins config as well as the resourcepack!
